rows.current_signature: fn buf_position(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Int
rows.target_type_policy: Adopt BufferOffsetU32 for position/offset surfaces.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_position_u32(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Result[UInt32, BufferError] and use checked Int->UInt32 conversion.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep buf_position(Int) as compatibility API and delegate through deterministic conversion boundary.

rows.current_signature: fn buf_read_bytes(buf: ByteBuffer, count: Int) -> Result[Bytes, BufferError]
rows.target_type_policy: Use BufferCountU32 for byte-count request parameters.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_read_bytes_u32(buf: ByteBuffer, count: UInt32) -> Result[Bytes, BufferError] and promote in new callsites.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Retain buf_read_bytes(Int) as wrapper that validates and forwards to buf_read_bytes_u32.

rows.current_signature: fn buf_remaining(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Int
rows.target_type_policy: Represent remaining byte-count as BufferCountU32.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_remaining_u32(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Result[UInt32, BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep buf_remaining(Int) for compatibility and map overflow/negative values to BufferError::InvalidInput.

rows.current_signature: fn buf_seek(buf: ByteBuffer, position: Int) -> Result[(), BufferError]
rows.target_type_policy: Use BufferOffsetU32 for seek targets in non-negative domains.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_seek_u32(buf: ByteBuffer, position: UInt32) -> Result[(), BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep buf_seek(Int) and forward after deterministic Int range validation.

rows.current_signature: fn buf_size(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Int
rows.target_type_policy: Expose buffer size using BufferCountU32 in typed surfaces.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_size_u32(buf: ByteBuffer) -> Result[UInt32, BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep buf_size(Int) as wrapper for existing callers.

rows.current_signature: fn buf_slice(buf: ByteBuffer, start: Int, length: Int) -> Result[ByteBuffer, BufferError]
rows.target_type_policy: Use BufferOffsetU32 and BufferCountU32 for slice boundaries.
rows.migration_action: Add buf_slice_u32(buf: ByteBuffer, start: UInt32, length: UInt32) -> Result[ByteBuffer, BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep buf_slice(Int, Int) and route through checked conversion to u32 surface.

rows.current_signature: fn new_buffer(capacity: Int) -> ByteBuffer
rows.target_type_policy: Use BufferCapacityU32 for non-negative capacity parameters.
rows.migration_action: Add new_buffer_u32(capacity: UInt32) -> Result[ByteBuffer, BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep new_buffer(Int) as compatibility constructor and map range failures to BufferError::InvalidInput.

rows.current_signature: fn new_growable_buffer(initial_capacity: Int, max_capacity: Int) -> Result[ByteBuffer, BufferError]
rows.target_type_policy: Use BufferCapacityU32 for initial/max capacity inputs.
rows.migration_action: Add new_growable_buffer_u32(initial_capacity: UInt32, max_capacity: UInt32) -> Result[ByteBuffer, BufferError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int API and delegate to u32 variant with deterministic conversion checks.

rows.current_signature: fn async_runtime_pressure() -> Result[AsyncRuntimePressure, NetError] effects { net, concurrency }
rows.target_type_policy: Use QueueDepthU32/RuntimeLimitU32 typed counters for runtime pressure status fields.
rows.migration_action: Promote async_runtime_pressure_u32() as preferred surface for machine-consumed status metrics.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep async_runtime_pressure(Int fields) and maintain one-way compatibility from typed u32 reporting.

rows.current_signature: fn async_wait_many_int(ops: Vec[AsyncIntOp], timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[AsyncIntSelection, NetError] effects { net, concurrency, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use UInt32 for selection indexes in status/selection outputs.
rows.migration_action: Promote async_wait_many_int_u32() and shift new integrations to AsyncIntSelectionU32.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Retain async_wait_many_int(Int index) for compatibility with existing pattern matches.

rows.current_signature: fn async_wait_many_string(ops: Vec[AsyncStringOp], timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[AsyncStringSelection, NetError] effects { net, concurrency, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use UInt32 for selection indexes in status/selection outputs.
rows.migration_action: Promote async_wait_many_string_u32() and shift new integrations to AsyncStringSelectionU32.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Retain async_wait_many_string(Int index) for existing consumers.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_connect(addr: String, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Int, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Introduce NetPortU16 and typed endpoint forms for host/port composition.
rows.migration_action: Add tcp_connect_host_port(host: String, port: UInt16, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Int, NetError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_connect(addr: String) and parse/format host:port via deterministic endpoint parser.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_get_keepalive_count(handle: Int) -> Result[Int, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Represent probe/status counters as UInt32.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_get_keepalive_count_u32(handle: Int) -> Result[UInt32, NetError] as primary.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_get_keepalive_count(Int) and preserve existing behavior for legacy callsites.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_listen(addr: String) -> Result[Int, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Introduce NetPortU16 and typed endpoint forms for listener setup.
rows.migration_action: Add tcp_listen_host_port(host: String, port: UInt16) -> Result[Int, NetError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_listen(addr: String) as string endpoint compatibility wrapper.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_local_addr(handle: Int) -> Result[String, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Expose endpoint return values as { host: String, port: UInt16 } for typed port use.
rows.migration_action: Add tcp_local_endpoint(handle: Int) -> Result[(String, UInt16), NetError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_local_addr(String) for legacy users and provide typed endpoint parser utility.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_recv(handle: Int, max_bytes: Int, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Use ByteCountU32 for max byte counts in transport read APIs.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_recv_u32(handle, max_bytes: ByteCountU32, timeout_ms) as primary read surface.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_recv(Int max_bytes) and route through checked u32 conversion.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_frame_len_be(header: Bytes) -> Result[Int, NetError]
rows.target_type_policy: Use FrameLengthU32 for 4-byte network frame headers.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_frame_len_be_u32(header) -> Result[FrameLengthU32, NetError] as primary parser.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_stream_frame_len_be(Int) as compatibility wrapper that converts from u32.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv(stream: TcpStream, max_bytes: Int, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Use ByteCountU32 for stream read bounds.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_u32(stream, max_bytes: ByteCountU32, timeout_ms) for fixed-width calls.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep tcp_stream_recv(Int max_bytes) as wrapper over u32 surface.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv_exact(stream: TcpStream, expected_bytes: Int, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use ByteCountU32 for exact-length read contracts.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_exact_u32(stream, expected_bytes: ByteCountU32, timeout_ms).
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int surface for legacy callsites and apply deterministic conversion at boundary.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv_exact_deadline(stream: TcpStream, expected_bytes: Int, deadline_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use ByteCountU32 for exact deadline-based receive contracts.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_exact_deadline_u32(stream, expected_bytes: ByteCountU32, deadline_ms).
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int variant as wrapper that validates range before invoking u32 variant.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv_framed(stream: TcpStream, max_frame_bytes: Int, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use FrameLengthU32 for framed protocol max-frame constraints.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_framed_u32(stream, max_frame_bytes: FrameLengthU32, timeout_ms).
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int framed API as compatibility wrapper.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv_framed_deadline(stream: TcpStream, max_frame_bytes: Int, deadline_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use FrameLengthU32 for framed deadline-based receive contracts.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_framed_deadline_u32(stream, max_frame_bytes: FrameLengthU32, deadline_ms).
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int variant and convert through deterministic range checks.

rows.current_signature: fn tcp_stream_recv_framed_payload(stream: TcpStream, frame_header: Bytes, max_frame_bytes: Int, deadline_ms: Int) -> Result[Bytes, NetError] effects { net, time }
rows.target_type_policy: Use FrameLengthU32 for parsed header length and max frame policy.
rows.migration_action: Promote tcp_stream_recv_framed_payload_u32(..., max_frame_bytes: FrameLengthU32, ...) as primary.
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep Int payload variant as compatibility wrapper.

rows.current_signature: fn udp_bind(addr: String) -> Result[Int, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Introduce NetPortU16 and typed endpoint forms for UDP binding.
rows.migration_action: Add udp_bind_host_port(host: String, port: UInt16) -> Result[Int, NetError].
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep udp_bind(addr: String) as endpoint-string wrapper.

rows.current_signature: fn udp_recv_from(handle: Int, max_bytes: Int, timeout_ms: Int) -> Result[UdpPacket, NetError] effects { net }
rows.target_type_policy: Use ByteCountU32 for UDP receive bounds.
rows.migration_action: Promote udp_recv_from_u32(handle, max_bytes: ByteCountU32, timeout_ms).
rows.compatibility_wrapper: Keep udp_recv_from(Int max_bytes) for compatibility.
